lead.approach: We emphasize clear communication, careful differential diagnosis when assessment is indicated, and collaborative treatment planning when therapy is the right fit. Clinical decisions are individualized and informed by current research and professional standards.
specialties: Adult and older adult neuropsychological evaluation
ADHD and autism spectrum diagnostic clarification
Psychotherapy for anxiety, mood, and adjustment concerns
Consultation with medical providers, schools, and referring therapists
